hostname spine-01
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 description Uplink to core-01
 ip address 10.0.0.1 255.255.255.252
 ip access-group ACL-EXTERNAL-IN in
 ip access-group ACL-EXTERNAL-OUT out
 no shutdown
!
interface GigabitEthernet0/2
 description Downlink to leaf-01
 shutdown
!
ip access-list extended ACL-EXTERNAL-IN
 10 permit ip any any
 20 deny ip any any
!
ip access-list extended ACL-EXTERNAL-OUT
 permit ip any any
!
router bgp 65001
 neighbor 10.0.0.2 remote-as 65002
!
end
